description: The lead section for the About page. Two-column layout: left is an eyebrow + large heading + two body paragraphs; right is a tall warm-toned team photo with an optional captions overlay.

fields.description: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.
fields.name: eyebrow
fields.title: Eyebrow

fields.description: The primary title of the section.
fields.name: heading
fields.title: Heading

fields.description: First paragraph — the founding story or mission statement (slightly larger text).
fields.name: body_p1
fields.title: Body paragraph 1

fields.description: Second paragraph — the values or working style (smaller, supporting text).
fields.name: body_p2
fields.title: Body paragraph 2

fields.description: Tall portrait-orientation photo (≈4:5). Warm, candid, human — not a posed corporate headshot.
fields.name: team_photo
fields.title: Team Photo

fields.description: Monospace overlay caption, only visible when no photo is set.
fields.name: team_photo_caption
fields.title: Team photo caption

name: About Intro

test_data.body_p1: Hello Vietnam started over a beer in 2016, when Linh realized most tourists were seeing her country through a tinted bus window. Ten years later, we've hand-built 18 trips across Vietnam — all led by people who grew up here.
test_data.body_p2: We skip the tourist traps. We pay our guides fairly. We eat lunch on the same tiny plastic stools as our guests.
test_data.heading: We're not a tour company. We're your loud Vietnamese cousins.

team_photo.alt: Warm portrait of Linh, founder of Hello Vietnam

test_data.team_photo_caption: team photo · lunch on plastic stools
